GaṇitSūtram

AI-powered mathematics learning for Class 5–12 students across India.

Hindi · Marathi · English  ·  CBSE · ICSE · State Board

Try GanitSūtram →Talk to Us

"See it. Love it. Then pay for it." — Try everything free before you commit.

Everything a student needs

One platform. Every class. Every topic. Every doubt — answered.

🧠

AI Tutor

Personalised step-by-step explanations that adapt to each student's pace and learning style.

🎯

Practice Engine

Thousands of problems across CBSE, ICSE & State Board syllabi. Difficulty adjusts automatically.

📊

Progress Tracking

Real-time dashboards for students, parents and teachers. Spot weak areas before exams.

🗣️

Multilingual

Learn mathematics in Hindi, Marathi or English. Switch languages mid-session.

📝

Exam Preparation

Full mock tests, previous year papers, and AI analysis of where marks are being lost.

👨‍👩‍👧

Parent Dashboard

Daily activity summaries, progress alerts and session duration — always in the loop.

Who is it for?

🎒

Students

Class 5–12

From fractions to calculus — every concept explained, every doubt resolved, at any hour.

📐

Teachers

School & Coaching

Assign practice sets, monitor class performance, and identify struggling students early.

🏠

Parents

Stay Informed

Get daily progress reports, study time tracking, and exam readiness scores on your phone.
